rationale: The citing paper includes Steffel et al. (2016) only in an early grouped citation supporting the general statement that defaults can affect consumer decisions. The paper does not engage with Steffel et al.'s specific ideas (e.g., disclosure or preference articulation), and it does not use that article for hypothesis development, design choices, or interpretation of results. Its core theorizing about sequential spillover and passive default acceptance is developed from other cited streams, so this is a passing background citation.
